name: Dinomight Knight, the True Dracofighter
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>真</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>拳</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ダイナマイト<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｋ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナックル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Dynamight Knuckle, the True Dragon Fist Fighter
desc: To Tribute Summon this card face-up, you can Tribute a Continuous Spell/Trap you control, instead of a monster. Once per turn, when your opponent activates a card or effect while you control this Tribute Summoned monster (Quick Effect): You can take 1 "True Draco" or "True King" Continuous Trap from your Deck, and either activate it or add it to your hand.
mnst_eff: To Tribute Summon this card face-up, you can Tribute a Continuous Spell/Trap you control, instead of a monster. Once per turn, when your opponent activates a card or effect while you control this Tribute Summoned monster (Quick Effect): You can take 1 "True Draco" or "True King" Continuous Trap from your Deck, and either activate it or add it to your hand.
eff: To Tribute Summon this card face-up, you can Tribute a Continuous Spell/Trap you control, instead of a monster. Once per turn, when your opponent activates a card or effect while you control this Tribute Summoned monster (Quick Effect): You can take 1 "True Draco" or "True King" Continuous Trap from your Deck, and either activate it or add it to your hand.

summoning: Uses Spell/Trap Cards as Tributes for Normal Summon
